---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in the module
title: ""
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A short description of the unexpected behavior.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps, or a link to a repo that reproduces the issue. The runnable `example/` app in this repo is a good base to fork from.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- `expo-callkit-telecom` version:
- Platform (iOS or Android) and OS version:
- Expo SDK version:
- React Native version:
- New Architecture enabled: yes / no
- Media transport (LiveKit, plain WebRTC, etc.) and its version:
- Device / simulator / emulator:

## Logs

Native logs if available — `xcrun simctl spawn booted log stream --predicate 'subsystem CONTAINS "expo"'` on iOS, or `adb logcat` filtered to your app on Android.
